benefit_en: Rs 6,000 per year direct cash transfer in 3 instalments of Rs 2,000
steps_en: Visit pmkisan.gov.in or nearest CSC centre
Click 'New Farmer Registration'
Enter Aadhaar number and state
Fill land details and bank account
Submit and note registration number
scam_note: PM Kisan is 100% free. No agent or middleman needed. Report fraud to 155261.

benefit_en: Short-term credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 4% interest rate per annum
steps_en: Visit nearest bank branch or cooperative bank
Ask for Kisan Credit Card application form
Submit land records and Aadhaar
Bank verifies land records and processes KCC
Collect KCC card within 15 days
scam_note: KCC is issued free by banks. No processing fee for loans up to Rs 3 lakh. Report fraud to 1930.

benefit_en: Crop insurance at 2% premium for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi crops
steps_en: Register at pmfby.gov.in or CSC or bank
Select crop and insured area
Pay premium (2% for Kharif crops)
Get policy document
Report crop loss within 72 hours to bank/insurer
scam_note: Only pay the 2% farmer premium. Government pays the rest. Don't pay anyone else. Call 1800-180-1551 to report fraud.

name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
name_gu: આયુષ્મान ભારત પ્રધાનમંત્રી જન આરોગ્ય યોજના
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh per family per year free health insurance at empanelled hospitals
steps_en: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or call 14555
Visit nearest Common Service Centre or hospital help desk
Submit Aadhaar and ration card
Get Ayushman card issued on the spot
Use card at any empanelled hospital for cashless treatment
scam_note: Ayushman card is issued FREE. No payment needed. Report fraud at 14555.

ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefit_en: Free LPG connection with stove and first refill cylinder
steps_en: Visit nearest LPG distributor (HP/Bharat/Indane)
Ask for Ujjwala application form
Submit Aadhaar, BPL card and bank details
Connection approved within 7 days
Collect cylinder and stove free of cost
scam_note: Connection is 100% free. No deposit. Report fraud at 1800-233-3555.

benefit_en: Free house worth Rs 1.2-1.3 lakh for rural BPL families
steps_en: Check name in PMAY-G beneficiary list at village panchayat
Submit application at Gram Panchayat office
Survey by government officials
Amount transferred in 3 instalments via DBT
Construct house as per approved plan
rejection_reasons: Name not in SECC 2011 priority list
scam_note: PMAY-G is completely free. No agent fee. Fraud helpline: 1800-11-6446.

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_en: Home loan interest subsidy up to Rs 2.67 lakh for EWS/LIG/MIG
steps_en: Apply at pmaymis.gov.in or through bank
Select applicable component (CLSS/BLC/AHP)
Submit income and property documents
Subsidy credited to home loan account
Reduce EMI immediately
rejection_reasons: Already owns house in any city
scam_note: Apply only through official bank or government portal. No agent needed.

benefit_en: Rs 2 lakh accidental death/disability cover at just Rs 20 per year
steps_en: Visit bank or use net banking
Enrol in PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
Rs 20 auto-debited from bank account every June
Keep auto-debit active for continuous coverage
File claim through bank in case of accident
rejection_reasons: Auto-debit failed due to insufficient balance
scam_note: Only Rs 20/year. No agent commission. Enrol directly at your bank.

benefit_en: Rs 2 lakh life insurance cover at Rs 436 per year
steps_en: Visit bank or use net banking/mobile banking
Enrol in PMJJBY scheme
Rs 436 auto-debited annually
Nominee gets Rs 2 lakh on policyholder death
File claim within 30 days at bank
scam_note: Only Rs 436/year. Enrol directly at bank. No middleman needed.

benefit_en: Collateral-free business loan: Shishu (Rs 50K), Kishore (Rs 5L), Tarun (Rs 10L)
steps_en: Visit nearest bank, MFI or NBFC
Fill Mudra loan application
Submit business plan and identity documents
Bank appraises and sanctions loan
Get Mudra card (RuPay) for withdrawals
scam_note: Mudra loans are free to apply. Report any demand for fees at 1800-180-1111.

benefit_en: Zero-balance savings account with Rs 10,000 overdraft and Rs 2 lakh accidental cover
documents: Aadhaar card (or any one official document)
steps_en: Visit nearest bank or BC (Banking Correspondent) point
Fill PMJDY account opening form
Submit Aadhaar and photo
Account opened same day
Get RuPay debit card free
rejection_reasons: Already has bank account (can still apply if no-frills account)
scam_note: Account opening is completely free. Never pay anyone to open a Jan Dhan account.

benefit_en: 8.2% tax-free interest on savings for girl child education and marriage
steps_en: Visit post office or authorised bank
Fill SSY account opening form
Deposit minimum Rs 250 to open account
Deposit between Rs 250 to Rs 1.5 lakh per year
Account matures when girl turns 21
rejection_reasons: More than 2 girl children (only 2 accounts per family)
scam_note: Open only at post office or bank. No agent needed. Interest rate announced by government quarterly.

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_en: Rs 6,000 maternity benefit in 3 instalments for first live birth
steps_en: Register pregnancy at nearest Anganwadi centre or health sub-centre
Fill PMMVY form (Form 1A) at Anganwadi
Submit after first antenatal check-up
Get Rs 3,000 first instalment
Get Rs 2,000 after delivery and Rs 1,000 after first vaccination
scam_note: PMMVY benefits come directly to your bank account. No middleman. Report issues to 7998799804.

ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefit_en: Free skill training + Rs 8,000 stipend + placement support + certificate
steps_en: Visit pmkvyofficial.org or nearest PMKVY training centre
Select skill course (IT, construction, healthcare, etc.)
Register online or at centre with Aadhaar
Complete free 3-6 month training
Appear for assessment and get NSQF certificate
scam_note: PMKVY training is completely free. Never pay any fee to training centres. Call 1800-123-9626.

benefit_en: Guaranteed pension of Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000 per month after age 60
steps_en: Visit bank or use net banking
Fill APY registration form
Choose monthly pension amount (Rs 1K-5K)
Auto-debit set up based on age and chosen pension
Pension starts from age 60
rejection_reasons: Income tax payer (not eligible after Oct 2022)
scam_note: Enrol only through bank. No middleman. Check contributions at nps.proteantech.in.

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_en: Collateral-free working capital loan: Rs 10,000 (1st), Rs 20,000 (2nd), Rs 50,000 (3rd)
documents: Vending certificate or letter of recommendation from ULB
steps_en: Apply at pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in or nearest bank
Get vending certificate from urban local body if needed
Submit Aadhaar and vending proof
Rs 10,000 credited to account in 7 days
Repay in 12 monthly instalments to get higher loan
scam_note: SVANidhi loan is free to apply. No processing fee for first loan. Report fraud at 1800-11-1979.

name_en: Indira Gandhi Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
benefit_en: Rs 200-500 per month pension for BPL senior citizens
steps_en: Apply at Gram Panchayat (rural) or Urban Local Body office
Submit age proof, BPL card and Aadhaar
Application verified by village level worker
Pension sanctioned within 60 days
Amount credited directly to bank account monthly
scam_note: Pension comes directly to bank. No agent needed. Report fraud at 1800-11-0001.

ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefit_en: Free assistive devices (tricycle, hearing aid, crutches, wheelchair, etc.)
steps_en: Get disability certificate from government hospital (40%+ disability required)
Apply at nearest ALIMCO camp or district disability office
Submit disability certificate and income proof
Attend assessment camp for device fitting
Receive device free at camp
scam_note: ADIP devices are given absolutely free. No payment needed. Contact ALIMCO at 0512-2770873.

benefit_en: Rs 500-25,000 per year scholarships for pre-matric, post-matric and merit students
steps_en: Register at scholarships.gov.in
Select applicable scholarship scheme
Fill application with marks and income details
Upload documents
Institute verifies and scholarship credited
scam_note: NSP scholarships go directly to bank. Never pay anyone to apply. Helpline: 0120-6619540.

benefit_en: Bank loans Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore for SC/ST/Women entrepreneurs
steps_en: Apply at standupmitra.in or nearest bank branch
Submit business plan and caste/gender documents
Bank appraises proposal
Composite loan (working capital + term) sanctioned
Repay over 7 years with moratorium of 18 months
scam_note: Apply directly at bank or standupmitra.in. No middleman fee. Helpline: 1800-180-1111.

name_en: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
name_hi: पीएम सूर्य घर मुफ्त बिजली योजना
name_gu: PM સૂર્ય ઘর muft bijli yojana
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
benefit_en: Subsidy Rs 30,000-78,000 on solar rooftop + 300 free electricity units/month
steps_en: Register at pmsuryaghar.gov.in
Select empanelled vendor from portal
Get solar panel installed on rooftop
Apply for net metering from DISCOM
Subsidy credited to bank after inspection
rejection_reasons: Electricity connection not in applicant's name
scam_note: Use only empanelled vendors from portal. Subsidy comes to bank directly. Helpline: 1800-180-3333.

benefit_en: Free skill training + placement in formal jobs for rural youth (18-35)
steps_en: Register at ddugky.gov.in or visit nearest RSETI/DDU-GKY centre
Select trade and location
Undergo free 576 to 2304 hours training
Assessment and certification
Placement assistance in formal sector jobs
scam_note: DDU-GKY training is free. You also get post-placement support for 12 months.

name_en: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)
name_hi: इंदिरा गाँधी राष्ट्रीय विधवा पेंशन योजना
benefit_en: Rs 300-500 per month pension for BPL widows aged 40-79
steps_en: Apply at Gram Panchayat or Urban Local Body
Submit death certificate, BPL card and Aadhaar
Application verified within 30 days
Pension sanctioned and credited monthly
Widow certified as such by Gram Panchayat
scam_note: Pension credited directly to bank. No agent needed. Helpline: 1800-11-0001.

name_hi: इंदिरा गाँधी राष्ट्रीय विकलांग पेंशन योजना
benefit_en: Rs 300-500 per month pension for BPL persons with 80%+ disability
steps_en: Get 80%+ disability certificate from civil surgeon
Apply at Gram Panchayat or ULB
Submit disability certificate and BPL card
Application verified and forwarded
Pension credited monthly to bank account
scam_note: Pension directly to bank. Report fraud at 1800-11-0001.
